data.content: Plan review rejected for revision. The proposed single-file UI change is feasible and reuses the existing  endpoint and shared popover primitives correctly, with no invariant issues found. Revision needed because the test strategy says no new automated tests are required, but this repository already supports browser/Storybook Vitest coverage and the acceptance criteria depend on a user-triggered interactive flow. Update the plan to include automated validation for the clickable version badge states: loading, update available with target version, latest-version-installed, and error fallback. After the plan adds that coverage, it should be ready for re-review.
